text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oho! So when you get a nosebleed, you should
pinch your nostrils for about ten minutes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've heard a lot of people say you should tilt your
head back, but I never knew about this! Sounds
worth a try!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I doubt my nose will start bleeding on cue,
though. Oh, now that I think about it, I got a
nosebleed once when I ran a whole lot...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... M-my nose... It just won't bleed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much she runs,
Matikanetannhauser's nose doesn't bleed, and
she only succeeds in exhausting herself.
